summary: Agent Swarm v1.80 — rate-limit resilience, workflow fixes, script sandboxing

beats.title: Create & track a task
beats.vo_line: With agent swarm, spinning up a task is instant. Watch Forge pick it up and start working in real time.

beats.title: Workflow run with structured output
beats.vo_line: Workflows chain agent tasks into repeatable pipelines. Each node's output feeds the next — no glue code.

beats.title: Scheduled automation
beats.vo_line: Schedules run your agents on a cron expression. Set it once, let it run every morning.
